justification: The diff updates Spring Boot to 3.3.13 and Java to 21, migrating javax to jakarta and using String.formatted() (line 48 in DataController.java), which is idiomatic. However, it removes the main application class annotations (@SpringBootApplication, SpringApplication.run) without providing a replacement entry point, breaking the app. It also removes spring-boot-starter-jdbc without justification. The test migration to JUnit 5 is correct.
